boatSpecs.label: Navigasi
boatSpecs.value: Kompas, GPS, AIS, Peta, Radio SSB, VHF Radio, Handy Talky

boatSpecs.label: Peralatan Keselamatan
boatSpecs.value: Life raft 50 orang, 30 life jacket, 2 fire extinguisher, first aid kit

boatSpecs.label: Speedboat
boatSpecs.value: 1 unit fiberglass dengan mesin Yamaha 40 HP

boatSpecs.label: Fasilitas
boatSpecs.value: AC cabin, large sundeck, sun chair, bean bag, snorkeling equipment, Bluetooth sound system, indoor dining room, fridge, dispenser, jacuzzi, Starlink WiFi
